response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep systems thinking, and notable contributions to open-source infrastructure, but his recent career gap and lack of explicit AI-native engineering or distributed systems ownership in his most recent role raise concerns about current relevance to the agentic AI-driven context. His Python exposure is absent, and while he has TypeScript and Node.js depth, the role requires Python mastery and direct experience with AI-generated code workflows.
strengths: Proven track record in distributed, high-throughput systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong open-source contributions and tooling expertise (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, DLang libraries)
Demonstrated stakeholder coordination and agile practices (CI/CD, TDD, pairing, scrum-like roles)
concerns: No explicit Python experience listed — critical must-have for the role
Career gap since Oct 2025 with no recent technical output; recent role at re:cinq was only 7 months
Lacks clear evidence of ownership over AI-generated code systems or agentic workflows at scale
